definitions: 重新夺回；收回；恢复占有/控制

examples.text:
Manuel Bonilla, boarded 
a borrowed yacht in New Orleans. With a group of heavily armed accomplices, he set sail for Honduras in hopes
of reclaiming power by whatever means necessary. Bonilla had a powerful backer,
examples.explanation: 这里的 reclaiming power 指“重新夺回权力/控制权”。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
